title: The Last Performance
subtitle: Chapter 01 · The First Fractures
introduction: Backstage after the final applause, a violinist rests a bow in velvet and notices a telegram on the dressing table.
description: Backstage after the final applause, a violinist rests a bow in velvet and notices a telegram on the dressing table.
observation: The bow settles. The telegram waits. The musician's attention moves from the stage door to a message already opened.
reconstruction: Carry the horsehair bow, the telegram, and the brass travel case.
attunements: The telegram confirms a safe arrival across the sea.
The case latch has just been opened.
The final note is preserved in the bow's quiet vibration.
revelation: When the bow settled into velvet, the final note was already safely across the sea.

anomaly_definition.misstep_text: Not there. Watch the velvet case on the dressing table.
anomaly_definition.success_text: You found the break. The travel case latch is unclicked before the performer reaches it.

capture_window.guidance_text: HOLD WHEN THE CASE LATCH ENCOUNTERS PRESSURE.
capture_window.success_text: Timeline isolated: case opened before performer arrives.

evidence_nodes.relevance: The bow retains the final note's vibration.
The ink is dry, but the text changes.
evidence_nodes.truth_connection: Message is registered before final string release.

evidence_nodes.relevance: The latch carries safe transatlantic postmarks.
